description:
Create nix/packages/pydeps-gen.nix:
- Build tool using appropriate builder (buildPythonApplication, buildRustPackage, or buildGoModule)
- Wrap with nix and nix-prefetch-url in PATH
- Add to flake.nix packages
- Add to registry

Pattern from rustdeps-gen.nix:
- Use makeWrapper to add nix tools to PATH
- Export as packages.pydeps-gen
title: Create Nix package for pydeps-gen
